Petition For Order Approving Agreement Settling Characterization Of Estate Assets And Debts
Off Calendar Jul-15-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Justin Prueitt for Josh Racko, Administrator (via Zoom).

Mr. Prueitt confirmed that the proposed settlement remained in the best interest of the estate and all interested parties. No other appearances were noted, and no objections were raised.

The Court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-17-2025 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION

Off Calendar Dec-09-2024 Off Calendar

Off Calendar Nov-18-2024 Continued To Dec-09-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-22-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-26-2024 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-06-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christina Gallagher Nelson appeared by zoom for and with Joshua Racko (petitioner) by zoom.
Benjamin Selters appeared zoom for Rodan Romine.

Mr. Selters stated that his client is not objecting to the appointment, but that there is an issue of bond. The court informed the parties of its fiduciary duties and expressed that going into a 12 million dollar estate with no bond is not something that excites it. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with respect to whether or not a bond should be ordered. Discussion was held regarding the estimated value of the separate property as well as an appropriate amount of bond. The court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration appointing Joshua Racko as the administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $5,500,000.00. Order for the same signed in open court. Status on close of estate is set for February 26, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-18-2023 Continued To Feb-06-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
